title: felicia abyssinica
intro: Felicia abyssinica, also known as Helichrysum italicum, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter, slightly sweet taste. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, inflammation, and wounds, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Felicia abyssinica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to create remedies for a range of health issues.
